description: Create and deploy a NextGen Connect channel named 'Lab_Report_Extractor' that extracts embedded PDF reports from HL7 ORU messages. The channel must listen on TCP port 6661 for HL7 v2.x messages using MLLP framing, extract Base64-encoded PDF data from the OBX-5.5 field, and decode it into binary PDF bytes. Save the decoded files to /home/ga/lab_reports/ using the naming convention '[Patient MRN]_report.pdf', where the MRN is retrieved from PID-3.1. A sample HL7 message is provided at /home/ga/test_data/test_oru_message.hl7. The system can be configured via the REST API (https://localhost:8443/api, admin/admin) or monitored through the web dashboard at https://localhost:8443.
